summary: Completed frontend testing of landing page redesign for TemaDom Bulgarian construction platform. All 11 features tested and verified working correctly.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Landing page loads with correct hero section
FRONTEND: Centered TemaDom logo in hero visible with gold glow
FRONTEND: BEFORE/AFTER bathroom images load correctly from /showcase/before_bathroom.jpg and /showcase/after_bathroom.jpg
FRONTEND: ПРЕДИ/СЛЕД labels visible on showcase images
FRONTEND: Gold arrow between before/after images with pulse animation
FRONTEND: Navbar contains: Начало, Как работи, Партньори, ЧЗВ, Обява, Още dropdown
FRONTEND: 'Твоят проект' button visible with gold border styling (rgb(246, 195, 106))
FRONTEND: Gold CTA button 'КАЧИ СНИМКИ НА ПОМЕЩЕНИЕТО' is visible and clickable
FRONTEND: CTA button navigates to /room-scan correctly
FRONTEND: Room type tabs visible: Баня, Кухня, Хол
FRONTEND: Room tabs navigate to /room-scan with correct room parameter
FRONTEND: FAQ section with 6 accordion items found

FRONTEND: FAQ items: Как работи AI дизайнерът?, Колко струва AI проектирането?, Колко време отнема генерирането?, Мога ли да променя стила?, Откъде са цените в бюджета?, Какво получава регистрирана фирма?
FRONTEND: FAQ accordion open/close functionality works
FRONTEND: Stats counter shows 6/56 firms format
FRONTEND: Theme toggle (dark/light mode) works correctly
FRONTEND: Light mode activates with 'light-mode' class on HTML element
FRONTEND: Dark mode restores correctly after toggle
FRONTEND: Desktop logo height is 98px (within expected range)
FRONTEND: Mobile hamburger menu visible at 390px viewport
FRONTEND: Mobile logo height is 72px
FRONTEND: Mobile menu opens with navigation items and login/register buttons
FRONTEND: Before/After images stack vertically on mobile
FRONTEND: Headline 'Ремонт без стрес — AI проектиране' visible
critical_code_review_comments: All landing page elements correctly implemented per design requirements
CSS animations (hero-fade-1 through hero-fade-5) working as expected
Responsive design correctly handles mobile (390px) and desktop (1920px) viewports
Gold color scheme consistently applied: border-color and text-color rgb(246, 195, 106)
Before/After showcase images load from /showcase/ directory correctly
FAQ uses native <details> elements with proper accordion behavior
test_credentials: No auth required for landing page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page redesign fully verified. Key elements: 1) Navbar with Начало/Как работи/Партньори/ЧЗВ/Обява + Още dropdown + Твоят проект gold button, 2) Hero with centered logo + BEFORE/AFTER bathroom images from /showcase/ + gold arrow, 3) Headline 'Ремонт без стрес — AI проектиране', 4) Gold CTA 'КАЧИ СНИМКИ НА ПОМЕЩЕНИЕТО' → /room-scan, 5) Room tabs Баня/Кухня/Хол, 6) FAQ section with 6 items using <details> elements, 7) Theme toggle dark/light mode, 8) Mobile responsive with 72px logo and hamburger menu.
